PowerShell(foreach \($f in "galaxy_stations.json.gz","galaxy_populated.json.gz","galaxy_1day.json.gz","galaxy_7days.json.gz"\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Method Head -Uri "https://downloads.spansh.co.uk/$f" -TimeoutSec 20 -UserAgent "EliteTrader/1.0 \(personal ED companion\)"; $gb = [math]::Round\($r.Headers['Content-Length'] / 1GB, 2\); Write-Host \("{0,-30} {1,6} GB   modified {2}" -f $f, $gb, $r.Headers['Last-Modified']\) } catch { Write-Host \("{0,-30} {1}" -f $f, $_.Exception.Message\) } })
PowerShell(Get-PSDrive F | Select-Object Name, @{n='FreeGB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,1\)}}, @{n='UsedGB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Used/1GB,1\)}})

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8666/api/marketdb/status -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "status:" $r.Content } catch { Write-Host "status FAILED:" $_.Exception.Message }; try { $s = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8666/api/state -TimeoutSec 8; Write-Host "state: HTTP" $s.StatusCode } catch { Write-Host "state FAILED:" $_.Exception.Message }; if \(Test-Path data\) { Get-ChildItem data | Select-Object Name, Length })

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8666 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "{0} pid={1} {2} started {3}" -f $_.LocalAddress, $_.OwningProcess, $p.ProcessName, $p.StartTime }; Get-Process python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id, StartTime, @{n='cmd';e={\(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$\($_.Id\)"\).CommandLine}})

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 16976,12600 -Force -Confirm:$false; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $left = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8666 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($left\) { Write-Host "port 8666 still held" } else { Write-Host "port 8666 free" }; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\app.py","--headless" -WorkingDirectory "f:\\Development\\elite-trader" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; $p.Id | Out-File -Encoding ascii "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\data\\server.pid"; Write-Host "server pid:" $p.Id; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8666/api/state -TimeoutSec 10\).StatusCode)
PowerShell(\(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Method Post http://127.0.0.1:8666/api/marketdb/seed -TimeoutSec 10\).Content)

PowerShell(while \($true\) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 30; try { $s = \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8666/api/marketdb/status -TimeoutSec 10\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; $ph = $s.seeding.phase; $line = "{0}  phase={1} dl={2}/{3}MB systems={4} stations={5}" -f \(Get-Date -Format HH:mm:ss\), $ph, $s.seeding.downloaded_mb, $s.seeding.total_mb, $s.seeding.systems_done, $s.seeding.stations_done; Write-Host $line; if \($ph -eq 'done' -or $ph -eq 'error'\) { Write-Host "FINAL:" \($s.seeding | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\); break } } catch { Write-Host "poll failed: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell($body = @{ max_cargo = 64; max_hops = 1; max_hop_distance = 23; capital = 90000000; source = "spansh" } | ConvertTo-Json; $r = \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Method Post -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8666/api/trade-route -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -TimeoutSec 120\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "spansh source ok, hops:" $r.hops.Count "source:" $r.source; $s = \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8666/api/marketdb/status -TimeoutSec 10\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "eddn connected:" $s.eddn.connected "| last msg:" $s.eddn.last_message_at "| skipped \(db empty yet\):" $s.eddn.skipped_unknown)

PowerShell($s = \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8666/api/marketdb/status -TimeoutSec 10\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "phase:" $s.seeding.phase "| systems:" $s.seeding.systems_done "| stations:" $s.seeding.stations_done "| db size MB:" $s.db_size_mb "| eddn msgs:" $s.eddn.markets_updated)

PowerShell(node --check ui\\app.js; if \($?\) { Write-Host 'js OK' }; $s = \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8666/api/marketdb/status -TimeoutSec 10\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "phase:" $s.seeding.phase "| systems:" $s.seeding.systems_done "| stations:" $s.seeding.stations_done "| db MB:" $s.db_size_mb "| eddn applied:" $s.eddn.markets_updated)

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id \(Get-Content "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\data\\server.pid"\) -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\app.py","--headless" -WorkingDirectory "f:\\Development\\elite-trader" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; $p.Id | Out-File -Encoding ascii "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\data\\server.pid"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $s = \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8666/api/marketdb/status -TimeoutSec 10\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "ready:" $s.ready "| stations:" $s.stations "| price rows:" $s.commodity_rows "| db MB:" $s.db_size_mb "| seeded:" $s.seeded_at)

PowerShell($body = @{ max_cargo = 64; max_hops = 2; max_hop_distance = 23; capital = 90000000 } | ConvertTo-Json; $t = Measure-Command { $script:local = \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Method Post -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8666/api/trade-route -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -TimeoutSec 120\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json }; Write-Host \("LOCAL engine: {0:n2}s | source: {1}" -f $t.TotalSeconds, $local.source\); foreach \($h in $local.hops\) { Write-Host \(" {0} \({1}\) -> {2} \({3}\)  +{4:n0} cr  {5:n1} ly" -f $h.from_station, $h.from_system, $h.to_station, $h.to_system, $h.profit, $h.distance\); foreach \($c in $h.commodities\) { Write-Host \("    {0} x{1}  buy {2:n0} sell {3:n0}" -f $c.name, $c.amount, $c.buy_price, $c.sell_price\) } })

PowerShell(.venv\\Scripts\\python -m py_compile elite/routes.py elite/server.py elite/spansh.py; if \($?\) { Write-Host 'py OK' }; node --check ui\\app.js; if \($?\) { Write-Host 'js OK' }; Stop-Process -Id \(Get-Content "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\data\\server.pid"\) -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\app.py","--headless" -WorkingDirectory "f:\\Development\\elite-trader" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; $p.Id | Out-File -Encoding ascii "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\data\\server.pid"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Write-Host "server pid" $p.Id)

PowerShell($body = @{ mode = "loop"; max_cargo = 64; capital = 90000000; radius = 100; min_supply = 64; jump_range = 23 } | ConvertTo-Json; $t = Measure-Command { $script:r = \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Method Post -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8666/api/trade-route -ContentType "application/json" -Body $body -TimeoutSec 180\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json }; Write-Host \("loop mode: {0:n1}s | {1} loops \(ranked by cr/hr\)" -f $t.TotalSeconds, $r.loops.Count\); $i=1; foreach \($l in $r.loops | Select-Object -First 5\) { Write-Host \("#{0}  {1:n0} cr/hr  \(+{2:n0}/trip, ~{3} min\)  {4} <-> {5}  {6} ly apart" -f $i, $l.profit_per_hour, $l.profit, $l.minutes_per_trip, $l.a.station, $l.b.station, $l.distance\); $c = $l.outbound.commodities[0]; Write-Host \("     out: {0} x{1} \(stock {2:n0}, demand {3:n0}\)" -f $c.name, $c.amount, $c.supply, $c.demand\); $i++ })

PowerShell(git status --short; try { $s = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8666/api/state -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Host "server: HTTP" $s.StatusCode } catch { Write-Host "server: down" }; \(Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell($exe = "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\dist\\EliteTrader.exe"; Write-Host \("exe size: {0:n1} MB" -f \(\(Get-Item $exe\).Length / 1MB\)\); $p = Start-Process -FilePath $exe -ArgumentList "--headless","--port","8677" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; try { $s = \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8677/api/state -TimeoutSec 10\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "exe /api/state: OK | system:" $s.system "| commander:" $s.commander } catch { Write-Host "exe API FAILED:" $_.Exception.Message }; try { $u = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8677/ -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Host "exe UI: HTTP" $u.StatusCode "length" $u.Content.Length } catch { Write-Host "exe UI FAILED" }; $d = \(Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing http://127.0.0.1:8677/api/marketdb/status -TimeoutSec 10\).Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "exe sees db at:" $d.db_path "| ready:" $d.ready; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force -Confirm:$false)

PowerShell(.venv\\Scripts\\python -m py_compile elite/routes.py elite/server.py; if \($?\) { Write-Host 'py OK' }; node --check ui\\app.js; if \($?\) { Write-Host 'js OK' }; Stop-Process -Id \(Get-Content "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\data\\server.pid"\) -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $p = Start-Process -FilePath "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\app.py","--headless" -WorkingDirectory "f:\\Development\\elite-trader" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; $p.Id | Out-File -Encoding ascii "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\data\\server.pid"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; Write-Host "restarted pid" $p.Id)

PowerShell(.venv\\Scripts\\python -m py_compile elite/autoplot.py; if \($?\) { Write-Host 'py OK' }; .venv\\Scripts\\python -c "import pydirectinput as p; import inspect; print\('keyDown sig:', inspect.signature\(p.keyDown\)\)"; Stop-Process -Id \(Get-Content "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\data\\server.pid"\) -Force -Confirm:$false -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $pr = Start-Process -FilePath "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\app.py","--headless" -WorkingDirectory "f:\\Development\\elite-trader" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; $pr.Id | Out-File -Encoding ascii "f:\\Development\\elite-trader\\data\\server.pid"; Start-Sleep -Seconds 4; $r = Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Method Post -Uri http://127.0.0.1:8666/api/plot -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"system":"Swoilz VW-F c3","dry_run":true}' -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Host "dry-run:" $r.StatusCode)

PowerShell($f = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Frontier Developments\\Elite Dangerous\\Options\\Bindings\\Custom.4.2.binds"; [xml]$x = Get-Content $f; $x.Root.ChildNodes | Where-Object { $_.NodeType -eq 'Element' -and \($_.Name -match 'Galaxy|Route|Plot|System|Map|Target|Cam|UI_'\) } | ForEach-Object { $n=$_; $pri=$n.Primary; $sec=$n.Secondary; "{0,-28} P:[{1} {2}] S:[{3} {4}]" -f $n.Name, $pri.Device, $pri.Key, $sec.Device, $sec.Key })

PowerShell($f = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Frontier Developments\\Elite Dangerous\\Options\\Bindings\\Custom.4.2.binds"; [xml]$x = Get-Content $f; Write-Host "=== Every action bound to Key_Space ==="; $x.Root.ChildNodes | Where-Object { $_.NodeType -eq 'Element' } | ForEach-Object { $n=$_; foreach \($slot in 'Primary','Secondary'\) { $e=$n.$slot; if \($e -and $e.Device -eq 'Keyboard' -and $e.Key -eq 'Key_Space'\) { Write-Host \("  {0}.{1}" -f $n.Name, $slot\) } } })
